name: @niivue/niimath

scripts.makeWasmGpl: git submodule update --init ../src/GPL && make wasm GPL=1 WASM_OUT=../js/src/niimath-gpl.js -C ../src && bun run scripts/pre-build.ts -i src/niimath-gpl.js -o src/niimath-gpl.js
scripts.prebuild: bun run make && bun run parseHelpText && bun run generateTypes && bun run makeWasm && bun run scripts/pre-build.ts -i src/niimath.js -o src/niimath.js && (bun run makeWasmGpl || echo 'GPL build skipped (submodule/emcc unavailable) — shipping BSD only')
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun run server.ts
scripts.pub: bun run build && npm publish --access public

author: NiiVue developers
description: A javascript library to easily use the WASM build of Chris Rorden's niimath command line program written in C
